gauge.name: Tombigbee River at Demopolis Lock and Dam

impacts.statement: Severe flooding occurs in Greene...Sumter...and Marengo counties with numerous evacuations required.

Some industrial and residential flooding begins just upstream from Demopolis Dam at 88 feet. Widespread flooding in Greene...Marengo...and Sumter counties occurs and some evacuations may be necessary.
Flooding of numerous cabins and trailers near the river can be expected.
Some cabins and trailers along the river begin to flood...as well as some secondary roads.
Flooding of lowlands in the area occurs and cattle should be moved to higher ground.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
